name: reducible-uncertainty
paperTitle: Towards Reducible Uncertainty Modeling for Reliable Large Language Model Agents
content:
## Introduction

Not all uncertainty is equal; reducible uncertainty signals can be improved through better training/data, enabling targeted improvement. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Not all uncertainty is equal; reducible uncertainty signals can be improved through better training/data, enabling targeted improvement.
